modal.intro: This game offers the Super Wheel bonus game, which is a live game show with a max win 5.000x. Super Wheel is played with hundreds of players simultaneously — creating a unique player experience.

modal.p1: Get into Bonuses faster than ever before! Bonus Reels is a brand-new bet option that removes all other symbols and focuses only on getting into Bonus rounds. Try it out!
